positive_prompt: Container width 320px, toggle height 48px, active bg #3B82F6, contrast ratio >= 4.5:1, transition 200ms ease, focus-visible outline 2px solid #2563EB.
negative_taboo: Do not use color alone to indicate the selected billing cycle.

positive_prompt: Tooltip max-width 280px, z-index 9999, padding 16px, bg #111827, text #F9FAFB, breakpoint <=768px change position to bottom-center.
negative_taboo: Do not block primary navigation elements with onboarding tooltips.

positive_prompt: Export card border 1px solid #E5E7EB, border-radius 8px, download icon 20x20px, gap 12px, margin-bottom 24px. Resolved conflict: kept 20x20px, removed 24x24px.
negative_taboo: Do not place destructive actions next to the export button without 16px gap.

positive_prompt: Sparkline stroke-width 2px, positive color #10B981, negative color #EF4444, aria-hidden=true on SVG, text contrast >= 7:1 for balance.
negative_taboo: Do not rely on red/green without a text indicator for trend direction like + or -.

positive_prompt: Slider track height 6px, thumb size 24x24px, active color #3B82F6, breakpoint <=1024px stack input below slider, gap 24px.
negative_taboo: Do not use thumb sizes smaller than 24x24px for touch targets.

positive_prompt: Date picker height 40px, padding-x 12px, border 1px #D1D5DB, icon color #6B7280, apply button margin-left 16px.
negative_taboo: Do not auto-refresh the statement table before the user clicks apply.

positive_prompt: Dropzone height 160px, dashed border 2px #9CA3AF, focus-visible ring 2px #3B82F6, aria-describedby for file limits, text #374151.
negative_taboo: Do not remove keyboard focus styles from the upload area.

positive_prompt: Step circle 32x32px, active bg #000000, line connector height 2px, breakpoint <=768px hide step text and show only circles, margin-bottom 40px.
negative_taboo: Do not use light grey text for incomplete steps that fails 3:1 contrast.

positive_prompt: Star icon 16x16px, star color #F59E0B, average score font-size 48px, bar chart height 8px, gap 16px.
negative_taboo: Do not display fractional stars without a numerical text equivalent.

positive_prompt: Illustration width 200px, title font-size 24px, shop button padding 12px 24px, breakpoint <=480px title font-size 20px, flex-direction column.
negative_taboo: Do not leave the empty state without a clear primary call to action back to shopping.

positive_prompt: Grid gap 24px, card aspect-ratio 3/4, heart icon absolute top 8px right 8px, price font-weight 700, hover shadow 0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1).
negative_taboo: Do not crop product images to irregular aspect ratios in the grid.

positive_prompt: Avatar 64x64px, alt text required, name font-size 18px #111827, bio font-size 14px #4B5563, contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 for bio.
negative_taboo: Do not use placeholder alt text like image for the author avatar.

positive_prompt: Sticky bottom 0, height 72px, play button 48x48px, progress bar height 4px, breakpoint <=768px hide volume control.
negative_taboo: Do not overlap the player bar with the main content footer without adding bottom padding to the body.

positive_prompt: Max-width 480px, overlay bg rgba(0,0,0,0.6), focus trap active, close button top 16px right 16px, aria-modal=true.
negative_taboo: Do not close the modal without returning focus to the trigger element.

positive_prompt: Thumbnail aspect-ratio 16/9, title line-clamp 2, gap 20px, date font-size 12px, hover transform translateY(-4px).
negative_taboo: Do not use different thumbnail aspect ratios within the same related posts block.

positive_prompt: Header height 56px, chevron transition 200ms transform, content padding 16px, border-bottom 1px #E5E7EB, breakpoint <=768px font-size 14px.
negative_taboo: Do not animate content max-height without using a performant easing function.

positive_prompt: Min-height 200px, border 2px dashed #D1D5DB, icon 48x48px, role=region, aria-label=File upload, keyboard accessible enter key.
negative_taboo: Do not use drag-and-drop exclusively without a click-to-upload keyboard alternative.

positive_prompt: Row height 48px, grade font-weight 700, passing color #059669, failing color #DC2626, padding-x 16px, hover bg #F9FAFB.
negative_taboo: Do not use pure red/green without checking for colorblind-safe palettes with minimum contrast 4.5:1.

positive_prompt: Primary value font-size 36px font-weight 700, secondary label font-size 14px color #6B7280, margin-bottom 8px, flex-direction column, align-items flex-start.
negative_taboo: Do not use the same font weight for both metric value and its label.

positive_prompt: Display name 24px #111827, role text 16px #4B5563, avatar 80x80px, gap 16px, breakpoint <=768px stack vertically with text-align center.
negative_taboo: Do not place the secondary role text above the primary display name.

positive_prompt: H1 font-size 56px, H1 line-height 1.1, subtitle font-size 20px, subtitle line-height 1.5, subtitle opacity 0.8, max-width 800px.
negative_taboo: Do not use line-height greater than 1.2 for the massive H1 title.

positive_prompt: H2 font-size 20px #111827, descriptive text 14px #6B7280, margin-bottom 24px, semantic heading tags used, contrast >= 4.5:1.
negative_taboo: Do not use bold font-weight for the modal's descriptive subtitle.

positive_prompt: Transform scale 1.05, border 2px solid #3B82F6, box-shadow 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), z-index 10, badge absolute top -12px, padding 32px.
negative_taboo: Do not give all pricing cards the same exact z-index and box-shadow if one is featured.

positive_prompt: Card bg #FFFFFF, border 1px solid #E5E7EB, hover shadow 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), drag active rotate 2deg, drag z-index 50, priority indicator 8x8px.
negative_taboo: Do not lack visual elevation shadow or z-index when a card is being dragged.

positive_prompt: Parent item font-weight 600, child item padding-left 32px, child font-size 14px #4B5563, icon 16x16px, breakpoint <=1024px collapse into drawer, z-index 40.
negative_taboo: Do not use the same font size and weight for parent and child navigation items.

positive_prompt: Top category 16px font-weight 700 margin-bottom 16px, sub-link 14px color #4B5563 line-height 2.0, hover bg #F3F4F6, grid-template-columns repeat(4, 1fr), padding 32px.
negative_taboo: Do not stack more than 10 sub-links under a single category without a View All link.

positive_prompt: Primary line stroke-width 3px #2563EB, grid lines stroke-width 1px #E5E7EB stroke-dasharray 4, tooltip z-index 100, tooltip shadow-lg, x-axis label 12px.
negative_taboo: Do not make grid lines as visually prominent as the data lines.

positive_prompt: Chart width 200px, legend flex-direction column, swatch size 12x12px border-radius 2px, label 14px #374151, value 14px font-weight 600 margin-left auto.
negative_taboo: Do not place the legend far away from the chart without a connecting layout container.

positive_prompt: Desktop grid 4 columns gap 32px, tablet <=1024px grid 2 columns gap 24px, mobile <=768px grid 1 column gap 16px, padding-y 64px, bottom border 1px #374151.
negative_taboo: Do not force a 4-column layout on mobile screens causing horizontal scroll or cramped text.

positive_prompt: Role=alert, aria-live=assertive, background #FEF2F2, text #991B1B, icon size 20x20px, focus-visible outline 2px solid #DC2626 on dismiss button. Resolved conflict: kept aria-live=assertive, removed polite.
negative_taboo: Do not use timeouts to auto-hide critical system error banners.
